reviews.comment:
Nada que sobresalga a cualquier estación del ACA!! Buena atención y predisposición! Baños en buenas condiciones y limpios! Bar mínimo en relación a otras estaciones del ACA pero sin faltar lo básico e indispensable!! Buena opción!!

(Translated by Google)
Nothing that stands out from any other ACA station! Good service and helpful staff! Clean and well-maintained restrooms! The bar is small compared to other ACA stations, but it has the essentials! A good option!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVM3ZPVEVBEAE

reviews.comment:
No te atienden con ganas. Los baños limpios pero sin luz. Una lastima porque el Aca no se caracteriza por este servicio.

(Translated by Google)
The staff isn't very friendly. The bathrooms are clean but dark. It's a shame because Aca isn't known for this kind of service.
